$comment: What an ESP32-S3 device writes to /devices/$deviceId/live every ~5 s. This is THE firmware<->cloud<->apps contract from the module spec (Module 4). Anomaly flags are pushed immediately as /alerts entries, not here.
title: DeviceLive

bpm.description: Breaths per minute from the DSP estimator (median of FFT + autocorrelation peaks). MUST be 0 whenever status != 'ok' — the device refuses to guess.

confidence.description: Estimator confidence (Module 3): SNR gate + FFT/autocorrelation agreement. Apps show 'no valid breathing' below the device-side threshold.

signalQuality.description: CSI link quality vs the calibrated empty/occupied baseline.

status.description: ok = valid bpm; no_breathing = occupied room but no periodic signal (possible apnea, feeds Tier-1 rules); low_signal = SNR gate failed, readout paused; calibrating = 60 s baseline step running.

updatedAt.description: Server timestamp, epoch milliseconds. Firmware uses the RTDB server-value placeholder {'.sv': 'timestamp'}.
